description_long: This object consists of a round, rustic wooden board with a rectangular wooden serving tray placed on top. The tray holds four slices of crusty bread, each with a golden-brown exterior and a soft, pale interior. The wood of both the board and tray appears unfinished or lightly sanded, with visible grain and a natural, slightly rough texture. The bread slices are arranged in a slightly overlapping manner, suggesting a casual, ready-to-serve presentation. There are no visible handles, decorative patterns, or brand markings on either the tray or the board. The overall appearance is simple and utilitarian, suitable for serving food in an urban park, café, or outdoor event.
description: A rustic wooden serving tray on a round board, holding four slices of crusty bread. The setup is simple, natural, and unadorned.
description_view_0: The tray and bread are viewed from a slight angle, showing the side of the bread slices and the layered arrangement on the rectangular tray atop the round board.
description_view_1: This view is more head-on, emphasizing the ends of the bread slices and the length of the tray, with the round board clearly visible beneath.
description_view_2: The bread slices are seen from the opposite side, highlighting their crusty tops and the full length of the tray and board.
description_view_3: A rear view showing the cut faces of the bread slices, with the tray and board's thickness more apparent.
attribute_rim_design: The round board has a slightly beveled edge, while the rectangular tray has a low, flat rim with minimal height and no decorative features.
attribute_reflective_properties: The surface appears matte with minimal reflectivity, showing no significant glare or highlights. Both the board and tray have a consistent, non-glossy finish.
